title: Why Local Rendering Changes the Product Risk
body: Show that local MP4 generation turns publishing into an integration problem instead of a product problem.
visualDirection: Bold title slate with a clear product-risk framing.
caption: Show that local MP4 generation turns publishing into an integration problem instead of a product problem.

title: Point 1
body: Draft packages need enough structure to be reviewed without guesswork.
visualDirection: Large readable text, subtle motion, and a progress cue.
caption: Draft packages need enough structure to be reviewed without guesswork.

title: Point 2
body: Rendering locally proves the creative system can produce actual assets.
visualDirection: Large readable text, subtle motion, and a progress cue.
caption: Rendering locally proves the creative system can produce actual assets.

title: Point 3
body: Once MP4 quality is acceptable, distribution can be handled by platform integrations.
visualDirection: Large readable text, subtle motion, and a progress cue.
caption: Once MP4 quality is acceptable, distribution can be handled by platform integrations.

title: What this unlocks
body: When the MP4 is real, publishing is just the next integration layer.
visualDirection: Final decision-oriented slate with a direct closing line.
caption: When the MP4 is real, publishing is just the next integration layer.
